name: Wand of Fireballs
description: This wand has 7 charges. While holding it, you can use an action and expend 1 or more charges to cast the fireball spell (save DC 15) from it. For 1 charge, you cast the 3rd-level version of the spell. You can increase the spell slot level by one for each additional charge you expend. The wand regains 1d6 + 1 expended charges daily at dawn. If you expend the last charge, roll a d20. On a 1, the wand crumbles into ashes and is destroyed.

recharge.destruction_roll: d20 on last charge, 1 destroys wand

attunement.description: You must attune to this wand by holding it for 1 hour during which you must maintain concentration as if you were casting a spell.

activation.description: Use an action and expend 1 or more charges to cast fireball

notes: This wand uses charges that recover daily. At higher rarities, similar wands may store different spells or have different charge mechanics.
